title: Matera CEO Weighs in on the Growth of Pix and Impact on Credit Cards
excerpt: In just three years, Brazil's hugely popular Pix payment system has become the country's favorite way to pay, replacing cash and wire transfers in many cases a
body:
In just three years, Brazil's hugely popular Pix payment system has become the country's favorite way to pay, replacing cash and wire transfers in many cases and now threatening the dominance of credit cards in the booming e-commerce sector.

Read the full article on [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/brazils-pix-payments-killing-cash-080523593.html).
